risk_description: Threat actor deploys ransomware targeting Zenith Cloud production Kubernetes clusters and databases, encrypting critical data and disrupting service
assigned_controls: EDR (CrowdStrike Falcon), immutable backups (AWS S3 Object Lock), network segmentation, offline backup copies
change_history: Q3 2025: Downgraded from High to Medium; Q4 2025: Maintained at Medium
change_justification: Q3: Improved backup architecture with air-gapped copies and successful recovery test in August 2025. Q4: No changes.

risk_description: AWS S3 bucket, RDS instance, or Kubernetes service misconfiguration results in unauthorized public access to customer PII or financial data
assigned_controls: CSPM (Wiz), IaC scanning (Checkov), SCPs enforcing private-only S3, weekly config drift detection
change_history: Q4 2025: Downgraded from High to Medium

risk_description: Concentration risk: 2 of 3 principal engineers hold unique knowledge of core platform architecture, payment processing integration, and disaster recovery procedures
assigned_controls: Knowledge sharing sessions, runbook documentation, cross-training program

risk_title: Third-party data breach via SaaS vendor
risk_description: Critical SaaS vendor (e.g., Snowflake, Auth0, or Datadog) experiences a data breach exposing Zenith Cloud customer data or credentials
assigned_controls: Vendor security assessments, SOC 2 review, contractual notification requirements, SSO integration with credential rotation capability

risk_description: Failure to maintain SOC 2 Type II attestation due to control gaps, resulting in customer contract violations and competitive disadvantage
assigned_controls: Continuous compliance monitoring (Vanta), dedicated compliance team, quarterly control testing

risk_description: Volumetric or application-layer DDoS attack exceeds mitigation capacity, causing customer-facing service degradation or outage
assigned_controls: AWS Shield Advanced, CloudFront WAF, auto-scaling, rate limiting, DDoS response runbook

risk_description: Current employee or contractor with privileged access intentionally exfiltrates customer data or intellectual property
assigned_controls: DLP (Microsoft Purview), privileged access management (CyberArk), database activity monitoring, background checks, quarterly access reviews

risk_title: Supply chain compromise via open-source dependency
risk_description: Malicious code introduced via compromised npm/PyPI package used in Zenith Cloud application stack
assigned_controls: SCA scanning (Snyk), private artifact registry, dependency pinning, SBOM generation

risk_description: PostgreSQL primary database reaches capacity limits during peak usage, causing latency spikes and potential service degradation
assigned_controls: Read replicas, connection pooling (PgBouncer), query optimization program, capacity monitoring

risk_title: Loss of key client — revenue concentration
risk_description: Top 3 clients represent 35% of ARR. Loss of any one would significantly impact revenue targets and may trigger employee layoffs
assigned_controls: Customer success program, multi-year contracts, product stickiness improvements, pipeline diversification

risk_description: Zero-day or unpatched vulnerability in API authentication layer allows unauthorized access to customer accounts or data
assigned_controls: WAF rules, API gateway validation, bug bounty program (HackerOne), quarterly pentesting, DAST scanning

risk_title: Compliance gap — GDPR data subject rights
risk_description: Failure to process data subject access/deletion requests within 30-day regulatory timeline due to incomplete data mapping
assigned_controls: Data catalog (Alation), automated DSR workflow (OneTrust), monthly compliance testing

risk_description: Production disaster recovery fails to meet defined RTO (4 hours) or RPO (1 hour) targets due to untested or incomplete DR procedures
assigned_controls: Automated DR runbooks, bi-annual DR testing, multi-AZ deployment, cross-region replication

risk_description: Compromise of TLS certificates, API keys, or encryption keys used to protect data in transit or at rest
assigned_controls: AWS KMS with hardware security modules, automated key rotation, Vault for secrets management, certificate pinning

risk_description: Targeted phishing campaign compromises employee credentials leading to unauthorized access to internal systems or customer data
assigned_controls: Phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2), security awareness training (quarterly KnowBe4), email filtering (Proofpoint), DMARC enforcement

risk_description: Attacker gains access to CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions, ArgoCD) and injects malicious code into production deployments
assigned_controls: Pipeline hardening, signed commits, OIDC-based deployment auth, artifact signing (Cosign), deployment approvals for production

risk_description: Failure to delete customer data within contractual or regulatory retention periods, exposing Zenith Cloud to legal liability
assigned_controls: Automated retention policies, data lifecycle management, quarterly retention compliance audits

risk_description: Logical isolation between customer tenants fails, allowing one customer to access another customer's data
assigned_controls: Row-level security in PostgreSQL, tenant-scoped API tokens, automated isolation testing in CI/CD, annual pentest scope includes tenant isolation

risk_title: Natural disaster — primary data center region
risk_description: AWS us-east-1 region experiences extended outage due to natural disaster or catastrophic infrastructure failure
assigned_controls: Multi-region deployment (us-east-1 primary, us-west-2 DR), automated failover, quarterly DR testing

risk_description: Business units adopt unauthorized SaaS tools that process customer data without security review, creating unmonitored data flows and potential compliance violations
assigned_controls: SaaS discovery tool (Productiv), procurement policy requiring IT approval, quarterly SaaS audit, CASB deployment

risk_description: Customer data inadvertently used in AI/ML model training or exposed through AI-powered features (e.g., copilot, search), violating data processing agreements
assigned_controls: AI governance policy, data classification tagging, training data pipeline isolation, opt-in only for AI features

risk_title: Physical security — office access control failure
risk_description: Unauthorized physical access to Zenith Cloud offices where employee laptops, network infrastructure, or sensitive documents are present
assigned_controls: Badge access (Verkada), visitor management, security cameras, clean desk policy, FDE on all laptops
